description: Sector overlay for agricultural producers, exporters, processors, aggregators, and related agribusiness documentation in Nigeria.

metadata.scope: Nigeria-only sector overlay controls for Agriculture. Intended to be used with nigeria_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Nigerian legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Nigeria Agricultural Quarantine Service official mandate
National Environmental Regulations relevant to agriculture/food operations
NAFDAC food/drug regulated product controls where agricultural output enters food/feed chains
used_for: food product quality and safety routing

rules.title: NAQS quarantine/export-import control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for agricultural quarantine, phytosanitary, sanitary, import, or export control evidence relevant to NAQS oversight.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Nigerian compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, sector context, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Pest and disease prevention control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for controls addressing pest, disease, contamination, or biosecurity risks in plant, animal, aquatic, or agricultural products.
